B

bad_id_buffer - 异常错误 中的变量com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
The buffer of parameters IDs that caused error, returned by the Configuration Subsystem.
bad_id_length - 异常错误 中的变量com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
The length of bad_id_buffer returned by the Configuration Subsystem.
Barcode - com.android.decode中的类
 
Barcode(String, int, byte[]) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.Barcode
 
BARCODE_SERVICE_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.decode.DecodeException
It is a Barcode Service error.
BARCODE_SERVICE_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
It is a Barcode Service error.
BarcodeDefaults - com.android.decode中的类
BarcodeDefaults provides methods to retrieve default decoder properties.
BarcodeDefaults() - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.BarcodeDefaults
This is the constructor of BarcodeDefaults.
BarcodeID - com.android.decode中的枚举
BarcodeID is an enumeration class defining constants for different decoded barcode types.
BarcodeManager - com.android.decode中的类
BarcodeManager gives developers access to decoder related methods of the device.
BarcodeManager() - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
This is the constructor of BarcodeManager.
BeamMode - com.android.decode.configuration中的枚举
The BeamMode is an enumeration defining the operating beam mode.
BooleanProperty - com.android.device.configuration中的类
BooleanProperty is the class that implements the property of type Boolean.
BooleanProperty(int) - 类 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.BooleanProperty
This is the constructor of BooleanProperty.
